description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a robust, angular hull with heavy armor plating covering the entire body, including the turret and chassis. The exterior is finished in a digital camouflage pattern with shades of brown, tan, and black, designed to break up its outline in urban environments. The turret is equipped with a multi-barreled rotary cannon mounted at the front, flanked by reinforced armor and angular panels for deflection. The vehicle rides on wide, continuous tracks with armored side skirts, providing stability and protection from small arms fire and debris. The front of the vehicle is sloped and reinforced, with visible viewports and sensor arrays integrated into the upper hull. No visible military insignia or unit markings are present, and the vehicle lacks traditional tires, relying instead on its tracked propulsion system.
description: A heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a digital camouflage pattern and a prominent multi-barreled rotary cannon on its turret. Its angular design and reinforced panels suggest a focus on protection and firepower.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped, reinforced hull, central viewport, and the imposing rotary cannon extending from the turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous track system, angular side skirts, and the turret's overhanging armor.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, exhaust ports, and the width of the vehicle's tracks, with the turret and cannon visible above.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the track system, side armor, and the rotary cannon's length.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One multi-barreled rotary cannon mounted on the front of the turret.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating, including reinforced sloped panels on the front, turret, and side skirts.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Digital camouflage pattern in brown, tan, black, and gray with angular, pixelated shapes.
